hero.headline: Professional Care with Heart
hero.subline: ViconiaCare GmbH – Your reliable home care service in Hamburgand surroundings
hero.badge: Certified Care Service under SGB XI & SGB V

services.heading: Our Services
services.subheading: We offer a comprehensive range of care services under SGB XI and SGB V – tailored to your individual needs.

grundpflege.title: Basic Care
grundpflege.description: Personal hygiene, dressing/undressing, mobilization – dignified and compassionate.

behandlungspflege.title: Medical Care (SGB V)
behandlungspflege.description: Wound care, medication administration, injections and other physician-prescribed services.

betreuung.title: Companionship & Activation
betreuung.description: .Daily accompaniment, cognitive activation and social participation

hauswirtschaft.title: Household Support
hauswirtschaft.description: Shopping, cooking, cleaning – so you feel comfortable at home.

verhinderung.title: Respite Care
verhinderung.description: Bridging care when your regular caregiver is unavailable.

nacht.title: Night & On-Call Service
nacht.description: 24/7 availability for emergencies and night care on request.

process.heading: Getting Started is Simple
process.subheading: Four steps to your personalized care

step1.title: Initial Phone Call
step1.description: We listen to you. In a no-obligation call we discuss your situation and first options.

step2.title: Needs Assessment
step2.description: An expert interview with our care team clarifies your exact support needs.

step3.title: Home Visit
step3.description: We come to you – for a personal care plan right at home.

step4.title: Care Begins
step4.description: Your care plan is ready. We start – punctual, reliable and with a dedicated contact person.

team.heading: Our Team
team.subheading: Experienced and compassionate professionals – here for you

testimonials.subheading: Trust that proves itself every day
